MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Robert Balian.
Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff Citicorp Vendor Finance, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Gerson/Overstreet aka Gerson/Overstreet Architects.
Principal of $45,141.81
Interest (from 8-23-02 to 3-13-03)$3,956.00
Attorney's fees of $2,825.00
Costs of $345.05
For the total of $52,267.86. Plaintiff is also entitled to the immediate possession of the property described in the judgment (see scanned document.)
Judgment signed in open court.
